name: Chengdu Qinchuan IoT Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Qinchuan IoT Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacturing, sale, and servicing of smart gas meters and Internet of Things system software. The company's principal products include IC card smart, Internet of things smart, membrane, remote control smart, and industrial and commercial gas meters. It also offers IoT smart gas solutions and Internet of things intelligent gas meter operating systems. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Chengdu, China.
